subcodes.first_line: O thou essence of remembrance and bearer of a spiritual title, hearken unto the Call that hath been raised from the direction of thy Lord's Throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ریحانه الذکر و روحانی اللقب ان استمعی ندآء الذی ارتفع عن جهه عرش ربک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @power of prayer, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
